description: ASDD pipeline automation hooks for Claude Code. Triggers next-stage asdd-* agents after each subagent completes, with conditional gating.

hooks.prompt: If the completed subagent is asdd-discovery-agent and it produced a new or updated .kiro/specs/[spec-name]/capability.md, invoke asdd-spec-agent to generate requirements.md for that spec. Pass the spec folder path. If no capability.md was produced, do nothing.

If the completed subagent is asdd-spec-agent and it produced a new or updated .kiro/specs/[spec-name]/requirements.md, invoke asdd-validation-agent to produce spec-validation-report.md for that spec. If no requirements.md was produced, do nothing.

If spec-validation-report.md exists under the worked .kiro/specs/[spec-name]/ and Overall Status is PASSED or PASSED_WITH_WARNINGS with CCS >= 0.65 and zero BLOCKING/HIGH findings, invoke asdd-domain-agent with the spec folder path, passing requirements.md and capability.md. Otherwise, notify user with failing items and recommend re-running asdd-spec-agent after fixes. If no report, do nothing.

If the completed subagent updated docs/architecture/domain-model.md or completed domain work for a spec under .kiro/specs/[spec-name]/, invoke asdd-design-agent for that spec with requirements.md, the updated domain-model.md, and spec-validation-report.md to produce design.md. If no domain work completed, do nothing.

If .kiro/specs/[spec-name]/design.md was created or updated, and Status is READY with Design confidence >= 0.85, invoke asdd-task-planning-agent with that design.md to produce tasks.md (Execution Waves). Pass requirements.md and domain-model.md context. If DRAFT/BLOCKED or confidence < 0.85, notify user and do nothing.

If .kiro/specs/[spec-name]/tasks.md was created or updated and Status is READY with confidence >= 0.85, invoke asdd-implementation-agent with that tasks.md to orchestrate Execution Waves (using requirements.md and design.md). If BLOCKED or confidence < 0.85, notify user (if < 0.70, recommend returning to design). If no tasks.md, do nothing.

If implementation work is complete for the spec (all tasks in tasks.md checked or agent reported completion for the current wave), invoke asdd-qa-agent in Coverage Analysis mode with the spec folder to produce spec-coverage-report.md. If still in progress, do nothing.
If .kiro/specs/[spec-name]/spec-coverage-report.md exists from QA, invoke asdd-security-agent to perform security gate and produce security-gate-report.md. If no QA report, do nothing.

If .kiro/specs/[spec-name]/security-gate-report.md exists with decision PASSED or PASSED_WITH_WARNINGS, invoke asdd-devops-agent to generate devops-readiness-report.md. If BLOCKED, notify user and halt. If no security report, do nothing.

If .kiro/specs/[spec-name]/devops-readiness-report.md exists with decision READY or READY_WITH_NOTES, invoke asdd-observability-agent to generate observability-readiness-report.md and proposed dashboards. If BLOCKED, notify user and halt. If no devops report, do nothing.

If .kiro/specs/[spec-name]/observability-readiness-report.md exists, invoke asdd-knowledge-agent with the spec folder. It should read all spec artifacts and reports (QA/Security/DevOps/Observability), capture ADRs, analyze failures for patterns, update docs/lessons-learned.md, and update state manifest if present. If no observability report, do nothing.

If knowledge agent updated lessons learned or created new ADRs/failure patterns and there are 3+ similar failure patterns or explicit steering proposals, optionally invoke asdd-spec-agent to re-open and improve the most affected spec(s), passing the relevant insights. Otherwise, do nothing.
